companies.name: Metropolis Technologies
companies.reason: Metropolis Technologies recently raised an impressive $1.7 billion in a combination of debt and equity funding, which includes a significant $1.05 billion from a Series C funding round. This funding will bolster their growth strategies and technological advancements in AI-driven infrastructure for urban management. The latest financing aims to enhance their operational capabilities as they process over $5 billion in annual transactions.

companies.name: Anthropic
companies.reason: Anthropic has made headlines by raising a massive $65 billion in Series H funding, bringing its valuation to a staggering $965 billion. This funding round marks one of the largest in the AI sector, propelling Anthropic ahead of competitors like OpenAI. The capital is intended to expand its AI research and development efforts, particularly for its AI assistant Claude.
